title: Snowstorm
description: The Snowy, Winter Themed Resource Pack!
body:
![Snowstorm Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/snowstorm/logo.webp)
## The Snowy, Winter Themed Resource Pack!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/snowstorm)




This pack changes the complete look of the game to cover everything in the world in a layer of snow, even across dimensions!
